ddls:
CREATE TABLE "race_tracks" (
  "race_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the race track */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the race track */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the race track */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the race track */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the weather station */,
  "track_surface_condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the track surface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "race_track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race track */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the course in meters */,
  "ground_type" INTEGER /* Type of ground (e.g., 1 for turf) */,
  "inout" INTEGER /* Inout setting of the course */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Number of turns in the course */,
  "fence_set" INTEGER /* Fence set identifier */,
  "float_lane_max" INTEGER /* Maximum float lane value */,
  "track_width" INTEGER /* Width of the track */,
  "fence_height" INTEGER /* Height of the fences */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the course configuration was updated */,
  "course_set_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the course set (e.g., 0 for active, 1 for maintenance) */,
  "finish_time_min" INTEGER /* Minimum finish time in milliseconds */,
  "finish_time_min_random_range" INTEGER /* Random range for minimum finish time in milliseconds */,
  "finish_time_max" INTEGER /* Maximum finish time in milliseconds */,
  "finish_time_max_random_range" INTEGER /* Random range for maximum finish time in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_courses_ground_type FOREIGN KEY ("ground_type") REFERENCES ground_types ("ground_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_courses_course_set_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_set_status_id") REFERENCES course_set_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_courses_race_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_track_id") REFERENCES race_tracks ("race_track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ground_types" (
  "ground_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ground type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ground type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ground type */,
  "maintainance_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of maintenance required */,
  "drainage_capacity" TEXT /* Drainage capacity of the ground type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ground_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_set_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "last_status_change" TEXT /* Last time the status was changed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Scheduled start time of the race */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Scheduled end time of the race */,
  "actual_finish_time" INTEGER /* Actual finish time of the race */,
  "winner_horse_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the winning horse */,
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the race */,
  "race_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the race was run */,
  "number_of_horses" INTEGER /* Number of horses participating in the race */,
  "race_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_status_id") REFERENCES race_statuses ("race_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES race_courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_race_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_type_id") REFERENCES race_types ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_types" (
  "race_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the race type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_statuses" (
  "race_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the race status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_status_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each race track

Number of turns in the course
